sanskrit:
ये मे मतमिदं नित्यमनुतिष्ठन्ति मानवाः।
श्रद्धावन्तोऽनसूयन्तो मुच्यन्ते तेऽपि कर्मभिः॥
transliteration:
ye me matam idaṃ nityam anutiṣṭhanti mānavāḥ |
śraddhāvanto 'nasūyanto mucyante te 'pi karmabhiḥ ||
literal_meaning: Those who—My—injunctions—this—eternal—execute—humans; faith-possessing—non-envious—are freed—they too—from karmic bonds.
contextual_meaning: Consistent, faith-driven action aligned with an internalized higher principle dissolves the psychological residue of action (guilt, anxiety, burnout) even when outcomes remain imperfect.
psychological_state: Secure-functioning: the mind shifts from outcome-obsession to process-trust, reducing rumination and ego-fatigue.
trigger_scenario: A junior doctor works 80-hour weeks, terrified of mistakes. After adopting a values-based mantra (“I treat with compassion and keep learning”), anxiety attacks drop and sleep improves even though workload stays high.
anchor_text: Live by timeless principles with steady faith and no envy to dissolve inner residue.
